claims.summary: The 768-to-8 fixed projection is deterministic, normalized column by column, and reused through a OnceLock.
claims.disposition: verify the fixed-seed matrix, normalized norms, and repeated health packet against current codec source and tests

claims.summary: A dead or nearly dead raw projection column needs a visible safety margin rather than only a boolean warning.
claims.disposition: implement minimum_threshold_margin_ratio in projection_basis_health_v1 and pin a large-margin regression

claims.summary: A detected unhealthy basis must not silently rotate and break semantic continuity.
claims.disposition: implement explicit no-automatic-rotation and captured-replay review policy fields without changing the live basis

claims.summary: Actually changing the projection seed, basis, width, or normalization would alter live semantic transport.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work requiring captured-wire replay, compatibility evidence, abort criteria, and post-change felt review
